data.title: ETH soars to $4,513 (+1.94%) post SharpLink's $3.7B investment, indicating bullish momentum.
data.description: The cryptocurrency ETH is currently trading at $4,513, representing a 1.94% increase. This surge follows SharpLink's significant investment of $3.7 billion in their treasury allocation. Technical analysis indicates a bullish trend, with the price maintaining momentum above crucial support levels.

data.title: Invitation Homes declares $0.29/share quarterly dividend for stockholders, payable by October 17, 2025.
data.description: Invitation Homes Inc. declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.29 per share on its common stock (NYSE: INVH). This dividend will be paid on or before October 17, 2025, to stockholders of record as of September 25, 2025. Invitation Homes, the top single-family home leasing and management company in the US, focuses on providing quality housing solutions.

EU Commission: ‘We have released an extra €40 million to support Ukrainians facing a fourth winter amid Russia's aggression. Boosting winter readiness and civilian protection, aid includes shelter materials and improved access to water, sanitation and heating.’

data.title: JP Morgan launches tokenized carbon credit platform on blockchain, improving transparency. Trials with S&P Global underway. Web3 disrupting carbon markets with increased efficiency and trust. Instituitional interest rising. Source: Grandview Research.(Token count: 238)
data.description: JP Morgan Chase has launched a tokenized carbon credit platform using blockchain technology, aiming to improve transparency in voluntary markets plagued by opacity. The system will allow for tracking of credits from issuance to retirement, enhancing trust, efficiency, and transparency in trading. Trials are ongoing with firms like S&P Global Commodity Insights. This move into Web3 aligns with the trend of real world asset tokenization, attracting institutions like Blackrock and Deutsche Bank. The initiative aims to streamline settlement for various instruments and enhance trust in carbon markets. Each carbon credit represents one metric tonne, and the platform is seen as a disruptor promising better price visibility, liquidity, and a globally compatible framework to amplify participation in carbon markets. JP Morgan sees a unique opportunity in this asset class to digitize and standardize systems.

data.title: BNB price surges near all-time high at $907.27, with RSI 65.57 and MACD indicating strong bullish signals. Key resistances breached.
data.description: The Binance Coin is currently being traded at $907.27, which is close to its highest value in the past 52 weeks. The Relative Strength Index (RSI) is at 65.57, indicating a positive market sentiment. Additionally, the Moving Average Convergence Divergence (MACD) is showing bullish momentum. This surge in value is attributed to BNB surpassing significant resistance levels.

data.title: Bitcoin reaches $115,000 with 0.83% gains; mid-sized whales accumulate 3.65M coins, showing returning institutional trust post volatility.
data.description: The price of BTC has surged to $115,000, recording a daily increase of 0.83%. This rise in value is accompanied by mid-sized whales amassing more than 3.65 million coins, indicating a growing trust from institutional investors despite the recent market fluctuations.

data.title: Ellomay Capital sets 2025 Annual General Meeting of Shareholders on Oct 23 at 3:00 p.m. in Tel Aviv, Israel.
data.description: On September 12, 2025, Ellomay Capital Ltd. disclosed plans for its annual general meeting of shareholders scheduled for October 23, 2025. The meeting will take place at the Company’s offices located at 18 Rothschild Boulevard, 1st Floor, Tel Aviv 6688121, Israel, starting at 3:00 p.m. Israel time. Ellomay, a leading renewable energy and power generator with projects in Europe, Israel, and the USA, trades on the NYSE American and TASE under the ticker symbol ELLO. This event is pivotal for shareholders and will be subject to possible adjournment or postponement.

data.title: Stock market hits record highs with Tesla leading buy signals; Dow Jones futures fall. Is a new bullish phase starting?
data.description: On Thursday, the stock market reached historic peaks with a strong rally. Tesla stood out among the companies showing buy signals, leading the way with its significant performance. The Dow Jones futures experienced a slight decline, sparking discussions about a potential new bullish phase for the market rally. Additionally, five stocks flashed buy signals, indicating a potentially favorable investment opportunity. This positive market trend reflects the growing confidence and interest among investors.
